workspace_note: All family members are gitignored full-run-workspace artifacts, reproducible from public CMS source data via the documented pipeline. Their absence on a clean clone is the normal, expected state and is not a lineage defect.

members.purpose: Full 2022 Medicare Part B provider-service feature table; input to the authoritative full-population run.
500,000-row development sample under its working name; the name the development pipeline reads.
1,000,000-row incremental scale-up artifact; retained as the engineering record of staged de-risking before the full-population run.
2,000,000-row incremental scale-up artifact; retained as the engineering record of staged de-risking before the full-population run.
5,000,000-row incremental scale-up artifact; retained as the engineering record of staged de-risking before the full-population run.

removed_members.reason: Verified byte-identical duplicate of features_provider_service_2022.parquet (matching size, MD5, and SHA-256; zero code references). The unsuffixed working name was retained.
